framework.name: AP2 reframes agent payments as authentication problem, not rails problem
framework.description: AP2's core insight is that the hard problem isn't moving money — existing rails work fine. The hard problem is proving an agent has authority to spend. This reframes the entire competitive landscape: processors don't need new payment rails, they need new trust/auth layers. Visa TAP and AP2 are both solving for trust, not settlement.
framework.raw_quote: today's payment systems generally assume a human is directly clicking 'buy' on a trusted surface, the rise of autonomous agents and their ability to initiate a payment breaks this fundamental assumption

source.title: Announcing Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) | Google Cloud Blog
